seoDescription: Review dryAPI data processing terms, controller-processor boundaries, and security obligations for enterprise teams.

elements.text: The DPA sets out data handling obligations, subprocessors, and security controls for enterprise workloads.

hero.heading: Data Processing Addendum
hero.body: Define controller and processor obligations for AI API traffic, account data, and support workflows.

sections.title: Roles and Processing Scope
sections.body: The DPA defines role boundaries and the categories of data processed to deliver the service.

cards.title: Controller and Processor Roles
cards.description: Clarify when customers act as controllers and when dryAPI acts as a processor.

cards.title: Data Categories
cards.description: Account, billing, and usage metadata are processed for service delivery and protection.

cards.title: Subprocessor Transparency
cards.description: Infrastructure subprocessors are managed under contractual and security controls.

sections.title: Safeguards and Data Subject Rights
sections.body: We apply technical and organizational controls and support rights-management requests.

cards.title: Security Controls
cards.description: Encryption, access boundaries, and retention controls reduce data handling risk.

cards.title: Request Handling
cards.description: Coordinate data subject access or deletion requests with our support team.

cards.title: Contractual Updates
cards.description: Material updates are communicated through customer channels and policy notices.

contactPanel.heading: Need a DPA review package?
contactPanel.body: We can help legal, security, and procurement teams review DPA terms for rollout readiness.
contactPanel.responseTime: DPA requests answered in one business day
